scope: AgenC AgentSummary service port for periodic subagent progress summarization.

requiredBehaviors: Schedule the first summary tick after the interval rather than immediately.
Schedule the next tick only after the current summary attempt completes.
Ask for a 1-2 sentence present-tense progress summary.
Skip missing or too-short transcripts and reschedule.
Do not reschedule after stop.
edgeCases: A long-running fork does not overlap with a second fork.
Transcript read errors are logged and still reschedule while the service is running.
Stopping while transcript lookup is pending prevents a fork from launching.

requiredBehaviors: Store summary text on live local-agent progress state without replacing token or tool counts.
Capture cache-safe summary parameters from the real child provider request and a fork-compatible child tool-use context once messages, options, model, cwd, and abort state are available.
Start summarization for registered AgentThread tasks when captured cache-safe parameters arrive after registration.
Stop summarization when the task is stopped or the agent reaches a terminal status.
Preserve a fork-compatible readFileState cache so the default summary fork can clone child tool-use context.
Preserve assistant tool_use blocks and paired user tool_result blocks when converting native LLM transcript messages for summary context.
edgeCases: Progress updates after a summary preserve the existing summary.
Native assistant toolCalls are converted to upstream-shaped tool_use blocks.
Native tool result messages are converted to upstream-shaped tool_result blocks with tool_use_id.

requiredBehaviors: Collect completed tool_use IDs from user tool_result blocks.
Drop assistant messages containing tool_use blocks that lack matching results.
Keep completed tool-use assistant messages, non-assistant messages, assistant messages without array content, and orphaned user tool_result messages.
edgeCases: An incomplete tool_use block drops the whole assistant message.

requiredBehaviors: Drop the original forkContextMessages closure and rebuild forkContextMessages from the current transcript each tick.
Preserve cache-safe parameters including the tool catalog instead of removing tools.
Deny all tool calls with canUseTool while preserving the cache key.
Use querySource and forkLabel values for the agent-summary fork and skip transcript writes.
edgeCases: No maxOutputTokens or maxTurns override is added by the summary service.
A fresh abort controller is passed for every summary tick.

requiredBehaviors: Extract the first non-empty assistant text block from fork results.
Skip API error assistant messages.
Update previousSummary only after a successful non-empty summary.
Call the injected progress update hook with taskId and trimmed summary text.
edgeCases: Malformed fork results produce no summary instead of throwing.
Empty and API-error results preserve the previous successful summary for later prompts.

requiredBehaviors: stop() is idempotent.
stop() clears pending timers and aborts in-flight summary forks.
Late fork results after stop do not update progress.
Expected aborts caused by stop are not logged as errors.
edgeCases: Calling stop while a fork is in flight prevents the finally block from scheduling another timeout.
